items.title: You've got to tell your OpenClaw to implement it to replace crons and subgents to the ext…
items.title_zh: 你必须告诉你的 OpenClaw 实现它来替换 crons 和 subgents 到 ext…
items.description: You've got to tell your OpenClaw to implement it to replace crons and subgents to the extent it can. That's the best hack I am using myself for now, but hopefully can get this fixed with better plugin APIs soon
items.description_zh: 你必须告诉你的 OpenClaw 实现它来尽可能地替换 cron 和 subgents。这是我目前使用的最好的 hack，但希望很快就能通过更好的插件 API 来解决这个问题
